headline: PPG Industries Expands Traffic Solutions With Ozark Materials Pavement Marking Deal
summary: PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) has completed its acquisition of Ozark Materials, a US-based pavement marking solutions provider. The deal expands PPG's pavement marking footprint across North America and adds new operational sites and product capabilities. The transaction supports PPG's long-term plan to grow its Traffic Solutions business and deepen relationships with infrastructure customers. For you as an investor, this move highlights how PPG Industries is leaning further into traffic and...
